snippets.title: Swyx on coding and enterprise
snippets.takeaway: i dont think anyone is correctly doing the math around how SpaceX, the NeoCloud+NeoLab, is currently going to market?
snippets.summary: Swyx (swyx on X) shared 2 recent updates. i dont think anyone is correctly doing the math around how SpaceX, the NeoCloud+NeoLab, is currently going to market? SpaceX has already recouped about HALF its investment in Cursor, in compute deals. The other half is paid for if Composer 3 does well. No other company is simultaneously a leading model lab + neocloud (at least where GPUs is concerned).

snippets.title: Aaron Levie on agents and enterprise
snippets.takeaway: Almost all AI model and agent progress is downstream from evals. Open weights post training for specific domains comes down to evals.
snippets.summary: Aaron Levie (levie on X) shared 2 recent updates. Almost all AI model and agent progress is downstream from evals. Open weights post training for specific domains comes down to evals. Agent improvements in the applied AI layer is all about evals. Agentic enterprise deployments that actually can augment work is all about evals. It’s all evals. This will become a core competency of any enterprise in the future.
